Japanese: 今、麟君の、って\n言ったよね

Japanese: よっちゃん、ご頭首の\n部屋で$c02逢魔$c00のケイコ？

what are you going to do

Japanese: ？\nこの電話、\n壊れてるのかしら？

English: It looks like the ceremonial plaque has changed.

English: The shadow of the soul at this time,\n It seems everything has already been revealed.

A humanoid figure?!\n Oh, is it $c02 Oumajin $c00 ?!

Japanese: 天井のガラスが\n割れる音
English: The sound of glass breaking on the ceiling

English: Well then, I'll be going now.
